caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as evidenced by the clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, gesturing slightly with his hand as he speaks, indicating an interactive and dynamic discussion. The overall atmosphere suggests a relaxed yet professional tone, typical of informal talk shows or podcasts.
